what_happened: Pinned all third-party GitHub Actions in dependabot-autofix.yml to full commit SHAs with version comments
why: Mutable version tags (e.g., @v4, @v6) can be silently updated by action maintainers, introducing supply-chain risk. Full SHA pinning guarantees the exact version used.
fix_applied: Replaced all `@vN` or `@vN.N` refs with `@<40-char-sha> # vN.N.N` format across 6 actions
pattern_to_remember: When pinning GitHub Actions to SHAs, use format `uses: owner/action@<full-sha> # vX.Y.Z`. Verify no mutable tags remain via grep for `@v` or `@latest` patterns after edits. The dependabot-autofix.yml workflow uses actions/create-github-app-token (SHA d72941d...), actions/checkout (SHA 11bd719...), actions/setup-node (SHA 49933ea...), pnpm/action-setup (SHA a3252b7...), anthropics/claude-code-action (SHA 8b26f0d...), and actions/github-script (SHA 60a0d83...).
